category_sources: source_facts.description says PNG image optimizing utility; official homepage describes pngquant as a command-line utility and library for lossy PNG compression.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is pngquant; official homepage heading is pngquant.
docs_sources: Official pngquant homepage provides download, manual options, algorithm notes, and source links.
repo_sources: Official pngquant homepage says the project is hosted on GitHub and shows the clone URL for kornelski/pngquant.
tags_sources: source_facts.description and official homepage identify lossy PNG compression, quantization, and command-line utility usage.
